{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Four beasts
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The four beasts on the stone door are a coiling [[dragon]], a phoenix, an armored warrior with a turtle shell, and a tiger.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
